query: I was charged twice this month and I want a refund.
final_response: We're sorry, we could not generate a verified response at this time. Please contact our support team directly.

rejected_fragments.fragment: We understand you were charged twice. Duplicate charges can occur due to a system error. We can investigate this and process your refund.

I understand you've been charged twice and are requesting a refund. For billing inquiries and refund requests, I need to escalate this to our specialized support team. They will thoroughly review your account and apply the appropriate refund policies to resolve this for you.
Duplicate charges can occur due to a system error. Please contact support with your transaction ID, and we will investigate and refund the duplicate charge within 5-7 business days.
Oh no, I'm so sorry to hear you've been charged twice this month. That's definitely frustrating, and I can certainly help get this resolved for you right away and process your refund.
